title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at IDP Education India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at IDP Education India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the IDP Education India family as a Curriculum Developer in Tiruchirappalli. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About IDP Education India:
IDP Education India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Support students with special educational needs
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Communication Skills

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IDP Education India!
